hypothesis: IF users practice for 15 minutes/day on adaptively generated bigram-targeted text with hidden real-time metrics THEN their WPM on a standard typing test improves by ≥5 WPM more than a control group using MonkeyType over 2 weeks.
falsification_criteria: If fewer than 30% of recruited users (target: 50 users from r/MechanicalKeyboards) complete 10 of 14 daily sessions, or if the adaptive group's mean improvement is less than 3 WPM above control after 14 days, scrap it.
